posts.title: Inside the Machine: A Look at Motorcycle Engines
posts.content: Peek under the hood as we explore how motorcycle engines work, what makes them tick, and why their engineering is so thrilling — from cylinders to spark plugs.
posts.contentSnippet: Peek under the hood as we explore how motorcycle engines work, what makes them tick, and why their engineering is so thrilling — from cylinders to spark plugs.

posts.title: The Cost of Lies
posts.content: Every lie we tell ourselves—about our history, our neighbours, our ideals—demands a hidden tribute. This essay unpacks the stakes of self-deception in politics, society, and memory.
posts.contentSnippet: Every lie we tell ourselves—about our history, our neighbours, our ideals—demands a hidden tribute. This essay unpacks the stakes of self-deception in politics, society, and memory.

posts.title: You, Still
posts.content: A moving look at Richard Feynman’s letter to his late wife, revealing how love can persist in absence — raw, quiet, and deeply true.
posts.contentSnippet: A moving look at Richard Feynman’s letter to his late wife, revealing how love can persist in absence — raw, quiet, and deeply true.

posts.title: Getting Started with Deep Learning: A Hands-On Introduction
posts.content: Learn how to build a working deep learning image classifier in just a few lines of code — and peek behind the scenes to understand what really happens under the hood.

posts.title: Mastering Python Decorators: A Practical Guide
posts.content: Dive into decorators — learn how they wrap and enhance functionality with a timing example, best practices, and clear code you can use today.

posts.title: Shores of the cosmic ocean
posts.content: In this piece, I reflect on our place in the vast universe — Earth as a tiny “shore” in the ocean of the cosmos, and how human curiosity drives us to explore what lies beyond our horizon.
